## Entities.Confections.IMoldedBonBonVersionEntity interface

Version interface for molded bonbon confections. Includes mold and chocolate shell specifications.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IMoldedBonBonVersionEntity extends IConfectionVersionEntityBase 
```
**Extends:** IConfectionVersionEntityBase
